crates.name: zk-core
crates.description: Pure cryptographic math. No Soroban dependencies. Compiles to no_std.

items.name: ZkError
items.doc: Errors returned by zero-knowledge conversion and validation operations.

items.name: Fr
items.doc: A BN254 scalar field element guaranteed to be in the range [0, r). Construct exclusively via SafeFrom to enforce field bounds without panicking.

items.name: G1Affine
items.doc: A BN254 G1 point in affine coordinates (x, y).
items.signature: pub struct G1Affine { pub x: u256, pub y: u256 }

items.name: G1Projective
items.doc: A BN254 G1 point in projective Jacobian coordinates (X:Y:Z). Internal representation used for efficient scalar multiplication.
items.signature: pub struct G1Projective { pub x: u256, pub y: u256, pub z: u256 }

items.name: SafeFrom
items.doc: Constant-time, fallible conversion into a cryptographic type. Implemented for Fr from u256 to enforce BN254 field bounds without panicking.

items.name: Bn254
items.doc: The BN254 elliptic curve group parameters and arithmetic operations. Provides modular arithmetic in both Fr (scalar field) and Fq (base field).

items.name: ElGamalCiphertext
items.doc: An ElGamal ciphertext consisting of two G1 points (c1, c2). Used for shielded and private balance encryption.
items.signature: pub struct ElGamalCiphertext { pub c1: G1Affine, pub c2: G1Affine }

crates.name: zk-soroban
crates.description: Stellar integration. Traits that extend the Soroban Env, host-function mappings, and XDR conversion.

items.name: validate_soroban_scalar
items.doc: Validates a Soroban U256 as a BN254 scalar. Prevents out-of-bounds field element errors in ZK verifiers by checking val < r.
items.signature: pub fn validate_soroban_scalar(env: &Env, val: U256) -> bool

items.name: ZkEnv
items.doc: Extension trait that adds ZK validation methods directly to the Soroban Env. Implemented for Env.

items.name: HostConvert
items.doc: Zero-copy conversion from a Soroban host-managed U256 into a validated BN254 Fr field element. The conversion performs a stack-only big-endian byte reinterpretation with no heap allocation, then delegates range validation to Fr::safe_from.

items.name: G2Affine
items.doc: A BN254 G2 point in affine coordinates (X, Y). Coordinates are elements of the degree-2 extension field Fq^2, represented as a + b*u where the first tuple element is the real part (c0) and the second is the imaginary part (c1).
items.signature: pub struct G2Affine { pub x: (u256, u256), pub y: (u256, u256) }

items.name: pairing_check
items.doc: Evaluates the BN254 multi-pairing product e(A1, B1) * ... * e(An, Bn) == 1. Delegates to the CAP-0075 host function so the entire check costs ~2M instructions regardless of pair count.
items.signature: pub fn pairing_check(env: &Env, pairs: &[(G1Affine, G2Affine)]) -> Result<bool, ZkError>

items.name: Poseidon2Sponge
items.doc: Poseidon2 sponge over BN254 Fr (t=3, rate=2, capacity=1). Calls env.crypto_hazmat().poseidon2_permutation() directly so the permutation runs as a single host call with no guest-side loop overhead.

items.name: hash_to_field
items.doc: Hash a slice of BN254 Fr field elements to a single field element. Compatible with Noir and Circom Poseidon2 constraints (t=3, d=5, rate=2). Uses capacity-zero sponge initialisation.
